sent_simp: 具体怎么做你自己看着办吧。
sent_trad: 具體怎麼做你自己看著辦吧。
pinyin: Jùtǐ zěnme zuò nǐ zìjǐ kàn zhe bàn ba.
english: As for exactly how to do it, just handle it however you see fit.

sent_simp: 他走到哪里，那条狗都相随左右。
sent_trad: 他走到哪裡，那條狗都相隨左右。
pinyin: Tā zǒu dào nǎlǐ, nà tiáo gǒu dōu xiāng suí zuǒyòu.
english: Wherever he goes, that dog always follows along by his side.
